description: PHP library for systematic literature reviews — multi-provider academic search, citation analysis, deduplication, and Laravel AI integration.

skills.name: Multi-Provider Academic Search
skills.description: Search across OpenAlex, Crossref, arXiv, Semantic Scholar, PubMed, DOAJ, and IEEE simultaneously using a unified Query model.
skills.example: php artisan nexus:search "deep learning plant disease" --providers=openalex,arxiv --format=json

skills.name: Fuzzy Deduplication
skills.description: Cluster duplicate documents across providers using DOI/ArXiv ID exact matching and Levenshtein fuzzy title matching via Union-Find.

skills.name: Citation Snowballing
skills.description: Expand a seed document set by recursively fetching forward (citing) and backward (referenced) papers from the citation graph.

skills.name: Citation Network Analysis
skills.description: Build directed citation graphs and compute PageRank centrality, degree centrality, k-core decomposition, and shortest citation paths.

skills.name: Co-citation & Bibliographic Coupling
skills.description: Analyze co-citation strength and bibliographic coupling between documents to discover intellectual structure in a literature corpus.

skills.name: Full-Text PDF Retrieval
skills.description: Discover and download full-text PDFs from arXiv, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, and direct URL sources with automatic fallback.

skills.name: Multi-Format Export
skills.description: Export document collections to BibTeX, RIS, CSV, JSON, and JSONL formats.

skills.name: Network Visualization Export
skills.description: Export citation graphs to GEXF (Gephi), GraphML (yEd/NetworkX), and Cytoscape.js JSON for visual exploration.

skills.name: Laravel AI Literature Agent
skills.description: A first-class Laravel AI agent (laravel/ai) that accepts natural language prompts and returns structured literature search results with streaming and queue support.

skills.name: Laravel AI Tool
skills.description: A composable Laravel AI tool that can be attached to any custom agent to add literature search capabilities.

skills.name: Artisan CLI Search
skills.description: Search academic databases from the terminal using the nexus:search Artisan command with table, JSON, or CSV output.

skills.name: SLR Prompt Library
skills.description: Pre-crafted system prompts and mega-prompts for AI agents performing systematic literature reviews, research gap analysis, and bibliometric reporting.

add_provider.description: Add a new academic database provider
